overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character moves from a street with soldiers and horses, along an elevated walkway with panoramic city views, and through a tree-lined avenue illuminated by ceremonial fire braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street with military checkpoint

events.description: approaching group of armored soldiers standing guard
approaching tethered horses with mount interaction prompt appearing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street toward the soldiers and horses

notable_agents.action: soldiers standing guard with spears and shields
horses tethered on the roadside, one with saddle

entered.detail: historic stone structure with decorative lattice window and columns
burning torch mounted on the building wall casting orange light
irregular stone pavement forming the street surface
group of armored NPC soldiers with spears
two horses standing on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a historic stone street at night, with the character walking toward a group of soldiers and horses. A burning torch illuminates the left side of the street, casting warm light on the stone building with lattice windows. The soldiers stand guard ahead while two horses are tethered on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic city overlook

events.description: passing the horses and transitioning onto an elevated walkway with stone railing
panoramic view of the ancient city becomes visible over the stone parapet

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated path with a view of the city below

entered.detail: low stone wall and railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
expansive view of the ancient city with lit buildings and temples below
large classical temple structure visible in the distance
green shrubs and vegetation lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the horses onto an elevated walkway bordered by a stone parapet. The scene opens up to reveal a stunning panoramic view of the ancient city below, with distant temples and scattered firelight visible against the night sky. The path is lined with bushes on the left and the stone railing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined ceremonial avenue with fire brazier

events.description: approaching large ceremonial fire brazier burning brightly in the center of the path
slight path adjustment to avoid pedestrian walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue passing the fire brazier and palm trees

notable_agents.action: civilian walking toward the camera along the path

entered.detail: large metal bowl on stand containing bright flames
tall palm trees lining both sides of the avenue
stone residential structures with columns and awnings
torches mounted on building walls providing warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a tree-lined avenue featuring a prominent ceremonial fire brazier burning in the center. Tall palm trees line both sides of the cobblestone path, creating a canopy effect, while ancient residential buildings with wall-mounted torches flank the street. The character passes the fire brazier and continues toward a distant archway, encountering a civilian walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal Egyptian city, transitioning from a guarded stone street to an elevated vista and finally into a ceremonial avenue. It begins on a historic street where a burning torch casts warm light on lattice windows as the character approaches soldiers and tethered horses. As the character moves past the guards, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway bordered by a stone parapet, revealing a panoramic view of distant temples and scattered firelight across the city below. The path then shifts from the open railing into a tree-lined avenue where tall palm trees create a canopy over a cobblestone road. Finally, the camera passes a prominent ceremonial fire brazier and residential buildings with wall-mounted torches, following the character toward a distant archway as a civilian walks by.
